name: azep-ninja--tator-launch-pad
description: Launch tokens on any chain without giving up 30-50% of your fees. Two paths: Easy Mode (call Tator API via x402 — works with any wallet provider, no env vars required) or Direct Mode (integrate SDKs yourself, keep 100% — requires signing key and RPC). Covers Clanker (7 EVM chains), Flaunch (Base), and Pump.fun (Solana). Includes strategy evaluation, fee management, claiming, recipient updates, and tax/legal guidance. Triggers: "token idea", "launch a coin", "launch a token", "deploy a token", "token strategy", "claim fees", "creator fees", "update fee recipient", "token launch on base", "launch on solana", "clanker", "flaunch", "pump.fun", "token economics", "is this a good token".
